contact.heading: Stop losing leads
contact.subtitle: We don't sell "boxes". We design the digital spine of your business. Leave a request and we will show you where you are losing money right now.
contact.formHint: Fill out the form, it will take 30 seconds.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Briefly about the task (for example: you need a CRM for a beauty salon)
contact.successText: A Taska manager will contact you at the specified number as soon as possible.
contact.errorText: Please try again in a minute or reach us via Telegram / phone.
contact.privacy: Your data is safe. We do not pass them on to third parties.
